name: Mocha Truffle Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Lightly grease two cookie sheets.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter and 1/2 cup of chocolate chips over low heat.
Remove from heat. Stir in the coffee crystals; cool for 5 minutes.
Stir in the sugars, eggs and vanilla; set aside.
In a medium mixing bowl, combine the flour, cocoa, baking powder and salt.
Stir into the coffee mixture.
Stir in the remaining chocolate chips.
Drop the dough by teaspoonful onto the prepared pans.
Bake for 10 minutes. Let cool for 1 minute before removing from sheet.
